exercises.code:
nombres = ["Ana", "Luis", "María"]
edades = [30, 25, 40]
for n, e in zip(nombres, edades):
    print(f"{n}={e}")

lines = ["r1", "r2", "", "r3"]

out = []

    line = lines[i]
    i += 1

        break
    out.append(line)

exercises.code:
cola = ["job1", "job2", "job3"]
while cola:
    job = cola.pop(0)
    print(job)

        print("PAUSE")
        break

exercises.code:
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guard")
    val = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if val == "END":
        break
    out.append(val)
print(out)

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total

print(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]))
print(tasa_reject([]))

exercises.code:
sts = ["reject", "accept", "reject", "reject", "accept"]
n_reject = 0
for s in sts:
    if s == "reject":
        n_reject += 1
print(n_reject)
print("O(n) basta para la tasa: solo necesitamos conteo de rejects / total, no pares O(n^2)")
